steps.title: Fit the exact function form
steps.content: The problem gives the model form $h(x)=a^x+b$ and two points, so use Desmos custom regression directly. Enter the points $(0,10)$ and $\left(-2,\frac{325}{36}\right)$, then fit $y_1\sim a^{x_1}+b$.

steps.title: Read $a$ and $b$
steps.content: Desmos returns $a=6$ and $b=9$. That makes sense because $h(0)=a^0+b=1+b=10$, so $b=9$, and the second point forces $a=6$.

steps.title: Compute the requested product
steps.content: The question asks for $ab$, not the full equation. Multiply the fitted constants: $$ab=6\cdot9=54.$$ Choice C is correct.
